title: ibatia sartago-diaboli
intro: Ibatia sartago-diaboli, also known as devil's rope or devil's cord, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including wound healing, anti-diabetic, and anti-ulcerative properties. In herbal preparations, Ibatia sartago-diaboli is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
